title: Pungent Fiery Mediterranean Gochugaru Pilaf
description: A flavorful and spicy pilaf dish that combines the bold flavors of the Mediterranean with the kick of gochugaru spice and the tanginess of ferment-jang.

ingredients.name: Rice
ingredients.notes: short-grain rice such as Calrose or Japanese mochigome

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the gochugaru and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the gochugaru and oil mixture.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Stir in the ferment-jang and reduce heat to low.
Cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
